info.title: Goodbase Public API
info.description: Goodbase public API for GoodOS apps. All public endpoints require an API key using X-Goodbase-API-Key or Authorization: Bearer.

get.description: Requires scope: read:health

get.summary: List apps allowed for the API key
get.description: Requires scope: read:apps. App results are filtered by allowed_app_ids on the API key.
Requires scope: read:storage. Returns Storage V2 bucket metadata including provider/CDN fields when available.
Requires scope: read:storage. Returns Storage V2 file/object metadata including object keys, checksums, versions, and public/CDN URLs when available.

get.summary: Call an HTTP Edge Function using GET
get.description: Requires scope: execute:functions. Executes through the GoodOS Edge Functions V2 controlled runtime when V2 metadata is enabled.

post.summary: Call an HTTP Edge Function using POST
post.description: Requires scope: execute:functions. Executes through the GoodOS Edge Functions V2 controlled runtime when V2 metadata is enabled.

get.description: Requires scope: read:db

get.summary: List rows from a published table
get.description: Requires scope: read:db

403.description: Missing required scope or table disabled

post.summary: Create a row in a write-enabled published table
post.description: Requires scope: write:db and table insert permission

403.description: Missing required scope or table disabled

get.summary: Get one row from a published table
get.description: Requires scope: read:db

patch.summary: Update a row in a write-enabled published table
patch.description: Requires scope: write:db and table update permission

delete.summary: Delete or soft-delete a row in a write-enabled published table
delete.description: Requires scope: write:db and table delete permission

get.summary: Read a public Storage V2 object
get.description: Public object delivery route for buckets marked public or public_read_enabled. This route is served from the root backend domain, not /api/v1.
Documentation marker for Edge Functions V2 runtime metadata returned under output._runtime.

200.description: Runtime metadata is returned during function execution.

get.description: Requires scope: read:realtime
Requires scope: read:realtime

get.summary: Subscribe to Realtime V2 SSE stream
get.description: Requires scope: subscribe:realtime. Use X-GoodOS-API-Key header.
Connect to wss://base.goodos.app/api/v1/realtime/ws?api_key=YOUR_KEY&channel=system with subscribe:realtime scope. Publish messages with publish:realtime scope.
Requires GoodOS session cookie or bearer token. Returns user, session, roles, and MFA factor state.

get.summary: Get Auth V2 roles for current user
get.description: Requires authentication.

200.description: Role matrix and current user roles

post.description: Requires authentication. Returns QR code data URL and setup secret once.
Creates a password reset token if an active account exists.
Uses a reset token to set a new password.

get.description: Returns the public GoodOS billing plan catalog.
Requires scope: read:usage. Returns usage, quotas, and current API key usage.
Requires scope: read:notifications.
Admin-only route for jobs, schedules, runs, locks, worker heartbeats, and queue items.

post.description: Admin-only route to process currently due jobs.

200.description: Encrypted secret reference created or rotated
Secret resolution test without raw value

get.description: Returns live file and database evidence for the nine GoodOS enterprise control domains.
